about.intro: Motivated Computer Science undergraduate with a strong foundation in Data Structures, Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, and Full-Stack Development. Skilled in designing scalable, reliable software solutions and passionate about IoT innovation.
journey: I'm passionate about building intelligent hardware and scalable software solutions using modern technologies like C++, Java, Python, .NET, React.js, and Node.js.

My experience spans from embedded systems and IoT development to full-stack web applications. I enjoy solving complex problems and have proven my ability to deliver high-impact projects in collaborative, fast-paced environments.
As an active competitive programmer on LeetCode, I continuously sharpen my algorithmic thinking and problem-solving skills, which I apply to real-world development challenges.

bullets: Developed an internal tool using **.NET and MS SQL Server** that improved workflow efficiency by **30%** through real-time deployment.
Designed and implemented responsive front-end interfaces with **HTML, CSS, and JavaScript**, enhancing usability across devices.
Integrated secure **CRUD operations** for dynamic data flow, supporting multi-user interactions with role-based access.
Coordinated with cross-functional teams to deliver **bug-free, production-ready software** on schedule.

projects.title: FlexiFlow
projects.subtitle: Web-Based Leave and Work From Home Request Management Tool
projects.description: Built a comprehensive web-based request management platform using .NET and MS SQL Server, enabling streamlined approvals for 50+ employees.
achievements: Developed department-level filtering and role-based access control
Implemented real-time status tracking for enhanced transparency
Created intuitive UI/UX for easy deployment and maintenance
Ensured robust back-end data handling with secure CRUD operations

projects.title: TragerX
projects.subtitle: Autonomous Smart Trolley System using ROS
projects.description: Engineered a smart autonomous trolley using Raspberry Pi, DC motors, ultrasonic and infrared sensors, and ROS for real-time human-following capability.
achievements: 🥈 2nd Place at IIITDM Kancheepuram IoT Hackathon
Implemented path-finding algorithms for optimized navigation
Achieved 40% better maneuverability and 20% lower power consumption

projects.title: Decimal to IEEE 754 Converter
projects.description: A Python script to convert decimal values into IEEE 754 binary format with high precision.

projects.title: Sports Image Detection
projects.description: Used machine learning algorithms to classify and detect different sports from images.

skills.note: Active problem solver on **LeetCode** with consistent practice in algorithmic challenges. Strong foundation in competitive programming enhances my ability to write efficient, optimized code for real-world applications.
